case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS MARTN ARLENE D.

docket_entries.description: PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTN ARLENE D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTN ARLENE D. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.82 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,055.82 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTN ARLENE D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTN ARLENE D.
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $100.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $35.31 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MARTN ARLENE D.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $164.55 AS TO DEFENDANT MARTN ARLENE D.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MARTN ARLENE D.
